recalls.Description: Yoto Ltd. has issued a recall for the Yoto Mini, a portable, screen-free speaker designed for children aged three to twelve. This speaker, which plays audiobooks, music, radio, and podcasts, features a pale gray body with orange controls and a pixel display. The model name Yoto Mini, along with SKU PRPLXX00860, can be found on the bottom of the unit. The recalled speakers were sold with a charging cable but did not include an adaptor or charger.
recalls.Title: Yoto Mini Speakers for Kids Recalled Due to Fire and Burn Risks; New Battery Replacement Kit Available
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Yoto Ltd. via email at minihelp@yotoplay.com or visit us.yotoplay.com/recall. More information is also available at us.yotoplay.com by clicking on 'RECALL INFORMATION' at the top of the page.

Products.Name: Yoto Mini Speaker
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 251,165 (In addition, about 18,932 were sold in Canada) (The speakers were previously recalled in April 2024.)

Injuries.Name: Yoto has received nine reports from U.S. consumers and three from a UK consumer of the speaker overheating or melting. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available online at us.yotoplay.com, Amazon.com, Target.com, and maisonette.com, as well as in toy and gift stores across the country from November 2021 to April 2024 for approximately $70.

Hazards.Name: Overheating lithium-ion battery posing burn and fire hazards

Remedies.Name: Stop using the speakers immediately, keep them away from children, and contact Yoto for a free battery replacement kit. Dispose of lithium-ion batteries according to local regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: Yoto recalls Mini Speakers for kids due to fire risks. Free battery replacement kit available. Contact Yoto for details.
